synced:
[00:15.15] Things fall apart and time breaks your heart
[00:21.60] I wasn't there, but I know
[00:28.10] She was your girl, you showed her the world
[00:34.16] You fell out of love and you both let go
[00:40.34] She was cryin' on my shoulder, all I could do was hold her
[00:46.72] Only made us closer until July
[00:53.43] Now I know that you love me, you don't need to remind me
[00:59.87] I should put it all behind me, shouldn't I?
[01:04.75] But I see her in the back of my mind
[01:11.55] All the time
[01:17.70] Like a fever, like I'm burning alive
[01:24.36] Like a sign
[01:32.60] Did I cross the line?
[01:37.80] Mm, hm
[01:40.73] 
[01:48.97] Well, good things don't last (good things don't last)
[01:52.28] And life moves so fast (life moves so fast)
[01:55.48] I'd never ask who was better (I'd never ask who was better)
[02:01.63] 'Cause she couldn't be (she couldn't be)
[02:05.22] More different from me (more different)
[02:08.57] Happy and free (happy and free) in leather
[02:12.47] 
[02:14.56] And I know that you love me (you love me)
[02:18.04] You don't need to remind me (remind me)
[02:20.86] Wanna put it all behind me, but baby
[02:26.42] I see her in the back of my mind (back of my mind)
[02:32.67] All the time (all the time)
[02:38.98] Feels like a fever (like a fever)
[02:42.07] Like I'm burning alive (burning alive)
[02:45.66] Like a sign
[02:53.63] Did I cross the line?
[02:58.05] You say no one knows you so well (oh)
[03:00.33] 
[03:02.61] But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
[03:05.06] 
[03:08.59] Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
[03:11.13] 
[03:14.44] I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
[03:16.82] 
[03:21.19] And I wonder
[03:24.44] Do you see her in the back of your mind?
[03:27.35] 
[03:31.19] In my eyes?
[03:33.55] 
[03:51.92] You say no one knows you so well
[03:56.86] But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
[04:03.85] Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
[04:09.17] I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
[04:15.52]
plain:
Things fall apart and time breaks your heart
I wasn't there, but I know
She was your girl, you showed her the world
You fell out of love and you both let go

She was cryin' on my shoulder, all I could do was hold her
Only made us closer until July
Now I know that you love me, you don't need to remind me
I should put it all behind me, shouldn't I?

But I see her in the back of my mind
All the time
Like a fever, like I'm burning alive
Like a sign

Did I cross the line?
Mm, hm

Well, good things don't last (good things don't last)
And life moves so fast (life moves so fast)
I'd never ask who was better (I'd never ask who was better)
'Cause she couldn't be (she couldn't be)
More different from me (more different)
Happy and free (happy and free) in leather

And I know that you love me (you love me)
You don't need to remind me (remind me)
Wanna put it all behind me, but baby

I see her in the back of my mind (back of my mind)
All the time (all the time)
Feels like a fever (like a fever)
Like I'm burning alive (burning alive)
Like a sign

Did I cross the line?
You say no one knows you so well (oh)
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt

Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
And I wonder

Do you see her in the back of your mind?
In my eyes?

You say no one knows you so well
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
